allow: Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan migrate --force)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan route:list --columns=method,uri,name)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan view:clear)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan config:clear)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan db:seed)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan tinker --execute=":*)
